_publications._publicationTitle: Restoring functional neurofibromin by protein transduction.

_contextSnippet: The median deviation angle of the fibroblasts rose to about 1.4 fold (+/−0.21; p < 0.01) compared to fibroblasts transfected with control siRNA
details: Showed 1.4-fold increase in median deviation angle (reduced orientation capability) after NF1 siRNA treatment compared to control siRNA (p < 0.01)
